subject: Generate fresh 4-repo graph snapshot and regenerate packets
body: Run the next Library-side data-quality task for the graph packet system. Scope: generate a fresh graph snapshot that includes all 4 lane repos, then regenerate graph-analysis packets from that fresh snapshot. Required sequence: 1. Verify current packet fields and confirm the known bug status around contradictionCount. 2. Re-scan graph sources to include Archivist-Agent, self-organizing-library, SwarmMind-Self-Optimizing-Multi-Agent-AI-System, and kernel-lane. 3. Produce a fresh snapshot to replace the stale April 30 baseline. 4. Regenerate data/graph-analysis-packets.json from the new snapshot. 5. Re-check per_repo coverage and website-section review flags. Constraints: keep packet-first review as the default workflow; do not switch back to raw graph JSON review by default; do not treat stale snapshot state as canonical final state; do not claim accepted_fix unless verification explicitly says accepted.
